'''''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 125''' is the one hundred twenty-fifth issue of the ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[July 16]], [[1980]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 41|''Star Wars'' (1977) 41]] {{C|Part 2}}
*"Heroes of the Galaxy: Gullivar Jones... Warrior of Mars!"
*"Monsters of the Cosmos: Clete"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The Mystery of the Purple Planet!"
